## Checklist
- [ ] Code runs locally without errors
- [ ] Tests pass (`python -m tests.<test_name>`)
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if new env variables added
- [ ] `requirements.txt` updated if new dependencies added
- [ ] README updated if setup steps changed
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets, API keys, or debug prints
